allow: Bash(node -e "import\('motion/react'\).then\(m => console.log\('motion/react exports:', Object.keys\(m\).slice\(0, 10\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERROR:', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('motion/react'\).then\(m => console.log\('has motion?', !!m.motion, 'type:', typeof m.motion\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('motion/react'\).then\(m => { const { motion } = m; console.log\('motion.div:', typeof motion?.div\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('lucide-react'\).then\(m => console.log\('lucide-react OK, exports:', Object.keys\(m\).slice\(0,5\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('lucide-react ERROR:', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('@react-three/fiber'\).then\(m => console.log\('r3f OK'\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('r3f ERROR:', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/motion/package.json'\); console.log\('motion version:', pkg.version, 'main:', pkg.main, 'module:', pkg.module\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('motion/react'\).then\(m => { console.log\('motion:', typeof m.motion, 'AnimatePresence:', typeof m.AnimatePresence, 'useInView:', typeof m.useInView\) }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\)")
